problem id: 846176af
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(4) AND SHL(6)

examples:
  10111011 -> 10000000
  11010100 -> 00000000
  01111011 -> 10000000
  11101111 -> 11000000
  00110011 -> 00000000
  00001000 -> 00000000
  11100010 -> 00000000
  01100001 -> 00000000

query: 01100111
predicted answer: 01000000
